reference.name: cdf-p3-lab+duckdb
reference.semantic_work: materialize finalized canonical CDF LZ4 IPC segments through a stock-libduckdb parallel C table function with Arrow ownership transfer and zero-copy vector references

bias.description: consumes an already-finalized package and omits CDF source execution, package construction, receipts, checkpoints, and commit gate
lab-only public C table-function implementation; no production destination path uses it yet
